_comment: model-broker.json is live runtime state: it is not tracked by git, and the
platform creates it (together with model-broker.secrets.json) on first save.
To configure a provider, use the TUI (/model setup, /model glm5, /model glm47)
or POST /v1/connections on the model-broker service; do not put API keys here.
This template ships disabled with no connections: enabled stays false until a
